productView.name: House Blend - Dark Roast
productView.shortDescription: A bold blend of Arabica and Robusta beans, offering a deep taste with notes of dark chocolate, toasted nuts, and a hint of smokiness - abarbu

productView.name: House Blend - Expresso
productView.shortDescription: A rich and full-bodied coffee experience with notes of dark chocolate, caramel, and nuttiness, ensuring every cup is delightful and aromatic.

productView.name: House Blend - Medium Roast
productView.shortDescription: A smooth and bold notes of caramel, toasted nuts, and fruitiness, ensuring a flavorful and aromatic coffee experience.
